_comment: aiUnit strategy config. ActiveStrategy picks the named strategy unless AIUNIT_STRATEGY env var overrides. Kind is one of: anthropic | openai-compatible | gemini | cli. For Kind=cli the harness shells out to the named Command and the executable owns auth; ApiKeyEnvVar is ignored for CLI strategies. For HTTP kinds aiUnit calls the API directly with an API key from ApiKeyEnvVar or AIUNIT_API_KEY.

codex-subscription.Description: Codex CLI using the logged-in subscription.

codex.Description: OpenAI Codex CLI driven by the operator's existing ChatGPT subscription. Spawns 'codex exec --skip-git-repo-check <prompt>' with image attachments as file refs.

claude-code-opus.Description: Claude Code CLI using Opus. Configure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or Claude CLI auth in the process environment.

claude.Description: Claude Code CLI driven by the operator's existing Claude subscription, pinned to Sonnet 4.6 via --model.

copilot-gemini.Description: Copilot CLI configured for Gemini. Configure the required Copilot CLI auth or API key in the process environment.

maf.Description: Internal Microsoft Agent Framework gateway. Fill BaseUrl and Model with the real endpoint before activating.

maf-grok.Description: xAI Grok through the OpenAI-compatible API. Set XAI_API_KEY before activating.

grok.Description: xAI Grok-4 through the OpenAI-compatible API. Set XAI_API_KEY before activating.

claude-api.Description: Anthropic HTTP API fallback for environments without the Claude CLI. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to activate.

codex-api.Description: OpenAI HTTP API fallback for environments without the Codex CLI. Set OPENAI_API_KEY to activate.

gemini.Description: Google Gemini Generative Language API. Set GOOGLE_API_KEY to activate.
